message:
So, the other day I took my pup, Max, for a walk around the neighborhood. As we strolled, I realized I had packed not only his favorite treats but also an extra leash, a water bottle, and a tiny first-aid kit (just in case). My fellow dog walkers must've thought I was preparing for a hike up Everest instead of just a jaunt around the block! 😄 

But you know what? It felt good to be ready for anything—whether it was a sudden rain shower or Max deciding he needed to make a new furry friend. 

Being the gloriously over-prepared person has its perks, especially when it comes to keeping our furry family members happy. This little refresher helped me think through what I might need for our next adventure. 

How about you? What’s the most ‘prepared’ you’ve ever felt for a simple outing?
